title: AudioPolicyState
description:
Versioned audio-policy state for a single VM.

This is the in-memory representation of `audio-state.json`. Parse with [`parse_audio_state`]; write v2 JSON with [`AudioPolicyState::to_v2_bytes`].

micGain.description: Microphone input gain, `0..=100`. `None` means "unset; use system default".

schemaVersion.description: Canonical schema version; always `"v2"` for newly written documents.

speakerLevel.description: Speaker output volume, `0..=100`. `None` means "unset; use system default".

AudioGrant.description: On/off grant for a single audio channel (mic or speaker).
